data.title: Kioxia Introduces New Mainstream KIOXIA BG8 Series SSDs for PC OEMs
data.description: Kioxia Corporation unveiled the KIOXIA BG8 Series client SSD for PC OEM clients in Tokyo. The new product brings PCIe 5.0 speed to the mainstream market, catering specifically to PC manufacturers.

data.title: Registration for the 2026 National Summit in San Diego, CA is Officially Open!
data.description: Sandler Partners, a reputable technology distributor, has initiated registration for their upcoming 3-day National Summit aimed at empowering Partners to expand their businesses. Scheduled to take place in REDONDO BEACH, Calif., starting from April 22, 2026, the event will offer valuable insights and resources to aid Partners in their growth. Interested participants can now secure their spots...

data.title: HashKey Group Announces Strategic Partnership with ANAP Holdings to Expand Bitcoin Treasury and Institutional Asset Management in Japan
data.description: HashKey Group, a subsidiary of HashKey Holdings Limited (3887.HK), revealed today in Tokyo that it has secured a tentative agreement to form a strategic alliance with ANAP Holdings Inc. (TSE: 3189), a prominent Tokyo-listed firm in Japan.

data.title: MetaOptics achieves a progressive milestone in securing design/evaluation orders for its metalenses and modules from world-class customers
data.description: On April 22, 2026, MetaOptics Ltd (Catalist: 9MT) disclosed a significant development in the company's progress. The firm, along with its subsidiaries forming the Group, has successfully secured design/evaluation orders for its metalenses and modules. This achievement marks a key milestone for MetaOptics and underlines its growing presence in the industry.
JPMorgan increases its Wabtec target price to $290 versus $280 previously

data.title: SC rejects oil company's argument in Great Lakes pipeline dispute. Michigan officials win with environmental concerns. Pipeline section to be decommissioned. Characters: 118
data.description: Michigan officials have successfully convinced the justices to side with them in their efforts to decommission an aging section of the pipeline, citing environmental concerns.

data.title: Three US politicians banned by Kalshi for betting on own election races, including Matt Klein from Minnesota State Senate.
data.description: A current member of the Minnesota State Senate, Matt Klein, stated that he engaged in a bet due to curiosity. Another individual, Mark Moran, mentioned that he was interested in observing how Kalshi reacts to insider trading behaviors.

data.title: Yalla Group Releases 2025 ESG Report
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Yalla Group Limited, trading under the ticker symbol YALA on the New York Stock Exchange, released its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. Yalla, the leading online social networking and gaming company in the Middle East and North Africa region, provided key insights and data on its sustainability efforts and social impact in the released report.

data.title: Citizens Bank Data Breach: Edelson Lechtzin LLP Launches Investigation Into Exposure of Personal Information
data.description: A well-known national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, is currently offering complimentary case assessments to individuals affected by the recent cybersecurity breach at Citizens Bank. The incident, which occurred in Newtown, Pa. on April 22, 2026, has led to an influx of data privacy claims. Those impacted are encouraged to take advantage of this opportunity for legal consultation with the firm. This initiative aims to address the concerns and provide guidance to the individuals affected by the breach.

data.title: NY, IL issue executive order banning state workers from prediction markets. Governor Hochul slams Trump admin for lack of ethical standards.
data.description: Governor Kathy Hochul of New York lambasted the Trump administration for failing to enforce effective ethical guidelines to prevent insider trading in prediction markets. Hochul expressed disappointment in the lack of meaningful standards, signaling a potential loophole in the regulatory framework. This critique comes amid growing concerns about the integrity of prediction markets, where individuals trade based on confidential information. The Governor's remarks underscore the urgency of addressing this issue, as it could have significant implications for market transparency and fairness.
